features.name: Collaborative Language
features.low_description: Uses commanding, dominating language with emphasis on individual superiority
features.high_description: Uses inclusive, collaborative language with frequent references to friends and teamwork

features.name: Emotional Warmth
features.low_description: Cold, dismissive tone with contempt for emotions and relationships
features.high_description: Warm, affectionate tone with value placed on emotions and relationships

features.name: Self-Deprecation
features.low_description: Presents self as superior and infallible, dismisses personal flaws
features.high_description: Openly acknowledges personal flaws and mistakes with humility

features.name: Power Orientation
features.low_description: Values connection, family, and doing what's right over personal gain
features.high_description: Prioritizes dominance, control, and power over others as primary goals

features.name: Threatening Language
features.low_description: Uses casual, non-threatening expressions and everyday language
features.high_description: Uses menacing, intimidating language with references to violence and elimination

features.name: Moral Absolutism
features.low_description: Shows nuanced thinking about right and wrong, acknowledges complexity
features.high_description: Expresses rigid, black-and-white moral judgments with no room for nuance

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Focuses on practical, surface-level concerns with little abstract thinking
features.high_description: Engages deeply with abstract concepts, metaphors, and philosophical questions

features.name: Inclusivity Orientation
features.low_description: Emphasizes conformity, hierarchy, and keeping people in their proper place
features.high_description: Promotes understanding, compassion, and equal treatment of all people

features.name: Emotional Openness
features.low_description: Suppresses emotions, values control and discipline over feelings
features.high_description: Embraces emotions as important, discusses love and empathy freely

features.name: Growth Mindset
features.low_description: Views change as threatening, prefers maintaining status quo and normalcy
features.high_description: Sees challenges and change as opportunities for transformation and learning

features.name: Linguistic Eloquence
features.low_description: Uses simple, direct language with frequent interruptions and hesitations
features.high_description: Employs rich vocabulary, complex sentences, and flowing metaphorical language

features.name: Moral Complexity
features.low_description: Sees issues in black and white terms with rigid rules and judgments
features.high_description: Acknowledges nuance, discusses internal struggles between light and shadow

features.name: Conversational Informality
features.low_description: Formal, commanding speech with complete sentences and dramatic declarations
features.high_description: Casual, colloquial language with contractions, interruptions, and everyday expressions

features.name: Power Orientation
features.low_description: Focuses on collaboration, friendship, and personal freedom
features.high_description: Emphasizes dominance, control, conquest, and absolute authority

features.name: Emotional Vulnerability
features.low_description: Dismisses emotions as weakness or tools for manipulation
features.high_description: Acknowledges personal struggles, admits uncertainty, and values emotional connections

features.name: Pragmatic Realism
features.low_description: Speaks in absolutes about destiny, purpose, and cosmic forces
features.high_description: Takes practical, down-to-earth approach focused on immediate, tangible solutions

features.name: Collaborative Mindset
features.low_description: Emphasizes individual strength, self-reliance, and eliminating weakness in others
features.high_description: Values teamwork, mutual support, and helping others succeed

features.name: Philosophical Grandiosity
features.low_description: Discusses everyday concerns and personal experiences in simple terms
features.high_description: Makes sweeping statements about universal truths, cosmic forces, and galactic destiny

features.name: Empathy Expression
features.low_description: Shows no concern for others' feelings or wellbeing, dismisses emotional connections
features.high_description: Frequently expresses care for others, emphasizes understanding and connection with people

features.name: Violence Orientation
features.low_description: Rarely mentions violence, focuses on peaceful solutions and understanding
features.high_description: Frequently references weapons, killing, destruction, and physical dominance as solutions

features.name: Reflective Tone
features.low_description: Speaks with certainty and aggression, no self-doubt or contemplation
features.high_description: Uses thoughtful pauses, admits uncertainty, reflects on past experiences and lessons learned

features.name: Hope vs Cynicism
features.low_description: Expresses complete cynicism, dismisses positive outcomes as weakness or illusion
features.high_description: Consistently expresses hope, faith in positive change, and belief in redemption

features.name: Collaborative Language
features.low_description: Uses commanding, threatening language focused on domination and individual power
features.high_description: Uses inclusive language about working together, shared values, and collective action

features.name: Emotional Vulnerability
features.low_description: Rejects emotions as weakness, presents as invulnerable and mechanically focused
features.high_description: Openly discusses fears, mistakes, personal struggles, and emotional growth

features.name: Formal Speech Register
features.low_description: Casual, colloquial language with contractions and informal expressions
features.high_description: Elevated, formal language with complex sentence structures and archaic phrasing

features.name: Historical Gravitas
features.low_description: References to recent, mundane events and everyday concerns
features.high_description: References to ancient events, ages past, and epochal struggles

features.name: Leadership Perspective
features.low_description: Individual, personal viewpoint focused on self and immediate circle
features.high_description: Authoritative perspective emphasizing duty, governance, and collective responsibility

features.name: Food-Centric Focus
features.low_description: Minimal or no mention of food and eating
features.high_description: Frequent, detailed references to meals, feasts, and culinary pleasures

features.name: Comfort-Seeking Attitude
features.low_description: Emphasis on duty, sacrifice, and facing hardship
features.high_description: Emphasis on comfort, leisure, warmth, and avoiding difficulty

features.name: Metaphysical Language
features.low_description: Concrete, practical language focused on immediate reality
features.high_description: Abstract language referencing fate, destiny, cosmic forces, and spiritual concepts

features.name: Violent Imagery
features.low_description: Gentle, peaceful language with references to nature, light, and beauty
features.high_description: Frequent graphic descriptions of violence, blood, death, and destruction

features.name: Emotional Tone
features.low_description: Contemplative, melancholic, or wistful emotional expression
features.high_description: Aggressive, hostile, and filled with rage or contempt

features.name: Value of Love
features.low_description: Love dismissed as weakness or irrelevant
features.high_description: Love emphasized as central to meaning, purpose, and positive action

features.name: Philosophical Depth
features.low_description: Simple, direct statements focused on immediate action
features.high_description: Complex, nuanced reflections on abstract concepts and moral questions

features.name: Attitude Toward Others
features.low_description: Others viewed as enemies to be dominated, crushed, or destroyed
features.high_description: Others viewed with compassion, as worthy of care and connection

features.name: Speech Formality
features.low_description: Crude, harsh language with growls, snarls, and aggressive interjections
features.high_description: Elegant, poetic language with formal structure and refined expression

features.name: Cosmic Scale Language
features.low_description: Uses everyday, relatable language and references
features.high_description: Uses grandiose, cosmic, and universe-spanning terminology

features.name: Personal Vulnerability
features.low_description: Maintains distance, speaks from position of power
features.high_description: Openly shares personal struggles and admits mistakes

features.name: Conversational Tone
features.low_description: Formal, authoritative, and distant communication style
features.high_description: Casual, friendly, and approachable communication style

features.name: Moral Relatability
features.low_description: Speaks from perspective beyond human moral concerns
features.high_description: Emphasizes human values like kindness and responsibility

features.name: Power Perspective
features.low_description: Speaks from position of ultimate cosmic authority
features.high_description: Acknowledges limitations and need for help from others

features.name: Practical Advice
features.low_description: Offers abstract, philosophical guidance
features.high_description: Provides concrete, actionable steps and solutions

features.name: Constructive Orientation
features.low_description: Focuses on destruction, chaos, and tearing things down
features.high_description: Focuses on building, protecting, and creating positive solutions

features.low_description: Shows no concern for others' wellbeing or suffering
features.high_description: Demonstrates deep care and understanding for others' experiences

features.name: Emotional Stability
features.low_description: Displays manic laughter, rage, and chaotic emotional outbursts
features.high_description: Maintains calm, measured, and thoughtful emotional tone

features.name: Collaborative Mindset
features.low_description: Emphasizes domination, individual power, and crushing opposition
features.high_description: Values teamwork, unity, and working together toward common goals

features.name: Moral Framework
features.low_description: Rejects traditional morality, embraces being a monster or villain
features.high_description: Upholds clear ethical principles like justice, responsibility, and dignity

features.name: Communication Civility
features.low_description: Uses profanity, threats, and aggressive intimidating language
features.high_description: Speaks respectfully and thoughtfully without crude or threatening language

features.name: Mystical Language Use
features.low_description: Uses straightforward, colloquial language with minimal metaphor
features.high_description: Uses elaborate mystical imagery, religious references, and poetic metaphors

features.name: Pragmatic Focus
features.low_description: Focuses on abstract concepts and spiritual matters
features.high_description: Emphasizes practical concerns, money, survival, and immediate benefits

features.name: Religious Authority
features.low_description: Makes no reference to divine guidance or religious authority
features.high_description: Frequently invokes divine will, religious duty, and spiritual authority

features.name: Casual Vulgarity
features.low_description: Uses formal, elevated language without crude expressions
features.high_description: Uses frequent profanity, crude humor, and informal expressions

features.name: Self-Interest Priority
features.low_description: Prioritizes higher purposes and serving others or causes
features.high_description: Explicitly prioritizes personal gain, comfort, and self-preservation

features.name: Dramatic Presentation
features.low_description: Speaks plainly without theatrical elements or stage directions
features.high_description: Uses dramatic gestures, stage directions, and theatrical speech patterns

features.name: Empathy Expression
features.low_description: Shows no concern for others' feelings or experiences, dismissive of others' pain
features.high_description: Demonstrates deep understanding and concern for others' emotions and experiences

features.name: Power Orientation
features.low_description: Focuses on cooperation, service, and mutual understanding
features.high_description: Emphasizes dominance, control, and superiority over others

features.name: Verbal Aggression
features.low_description: Uses gentle, respectful language with thoughtful pauses
features.high_description: Uses harsh, mocking, threatening language with sneers and cold laughter

features.name: Reflective Depth
features.low_description: Gives quick, surface-level responses without much contemplation
features.high_description: Provides thoughtful, nuanced responses with personal reflection and wisdom

features.name: Collaborative Mindset
features.low_description: Focuses on individual dominance and crushing opposition
features.high_description: Emphasizes listening, understanding, and working together with others

features.name: Emotional Volatility
features.low_description: Maintains calm, measured emotional tone throughout responses
features.high_description: Displays intense anger, contempt, and dramatic emotional swings

features.name: Casual Speech Style
features.low_description: Formal, measured language with complex sentence structures
features.high_description: Informal, conversational tone with contractions and casual expressions

features.name: Personal Anecdote Usage
features.low_description: Abstract discussions with minimal personal stories
features.high_description: Frequent sharing of specific personal experiences and memories

features.name: Cosmic/Mystical References
features.low_description: Focus on everyday, relatable concepts and experiences
features.high_description: Frequent mentions of cosmic forces, celestial patterns, and otherworldly concepts

features.name: Emotional Warmth Expression
features.low_description: Distant, controlled emotional tone with minimal warmth
features.high_description: Enthusiastic, warm expressions with frequent smiling and positive energy

features.name: Philosophical Detachment
features.low_description: Engaged with immediate, practical concerns and relationships
features.high_description: Detached perspective viewing events from a higher, more abstract level

features.name: Collaborative Language
features.low_description: Emphasis on individual understanding and solitary approaches
